name: worker-tip-channels
description: FRONTIER-AUDIT Layer-1 E1.4 closure — server-side handlers for USSD, SMS, and voice tip submission channels. Each channel encrypts the tip with the same libsodium sealed-box used by the browser portal before persistence, so a citizen who only has a feature phone has the same privacy guarantees as a smartphone user. Telecom-gateway integration (MTN Cameroon / Orange Cameroon) is configured via env at deploy time; handlers ship deploy-ready.
